title: S&P 1500 Return and Volatility Clustering
excerpt: Identification of distinct S&P 1500 constituent groups based on daily price return and volatility. Unsupervised machine learning algorithms are run via Scikit-learn on data pulled from yfinance.

title: Starbucks Valuation Model
excerpt: Comprehensive equity valuation of Starbucks built on a spreadsheet model, integrating Discounted Cash Flow, Abnormal Profit, and Comparable Multiples analysis. Data is extracted automatically via Python and model assumptions are supported by AI.
